news.t: Innovator Builds Upon the Largest Suite of Buffer ETFs™ with Three 100% Downside Protection Launches*

overview.description: The Innovator 2 Yr to October 2026 (AOCT) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in downside hedge alternatives. The fund seeks to track the return of the SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust (SPY), to a cap, with 100% downside hedge over a two-year outcome period. The actively managed fund holds FLEX options to obtain exposure AOCT was launched on Sep 30, 2024 and is issued by Innovator.
